data.title: US Courts New Buyers For TikTok As Deal Deadline Approaches: 'All Four Are Good,' Says Trump
data.description: The Trump administration is reportedly in discussions with four different groups regarding the sale of the Chinese short video platform, TikTok.

data.title: Chamath Palihapitiya Calls Proposed 10% Credit Card Interest Rate Cap 'Disruptive' As Trump, Sanders, And Lawmakers Push For Reform
data.description: Chamath Palihapitiya believes a proposed 10% cap on credit card interest rates would significantly disrupt the financial services industry.

data.title: US Economic Slowdown 'Talk Of The Town,' Says Economist Mohamed El-Erian As Fed Chair Powell Reaffirms Growth At 'Solid Pace'
data.description: Mohamed El-Erian highlighted the risks of an economic slowdown as Jerome Powell reiterated that the economy was growing at a "solid pace".

data.title: Tesla Suspected Of EV Rebate Manipulation In Canada Amid Sudden Sales Surge Before Deadline: 'Tesla Gamed The System', Says Industry Body
data.description: Four Canadian stores of Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) have been suspected of exploiting the country's EV rebate program. The stores are said to have sold an average of 30 cars per hour over three days, claiming over 50% of the remaining rebate funds.

data.title: Tesla Rival XPeng Aims To Mass-Produce Flying Cars By 2026, But Regulators May Ground Takeoff
data.description: A subsidiary of Chinese electric vehicle maker Xpeng Inc. aims to become the world's first mass producer of flying cars by 2026.
